ecu.label: 大特写 (ECU)
ecu.description: 眼睛/手部细节，情绪极致放大

cu.label: 特写 (CU)
cu.description: 面部表情为主，肩部以上入画

mcu.label: 中近景 (MCU)
mcu.description: 胸部以上，保留部分肢体语言

ms.label: 中景 (MS)
ms.description: 腰部以上，人物与环境关系清晰

mls.label: 全景 (MLS)
mls.description: 全身入画，空间关系完整

static.label: 固定机位
static.motivation: 让画面内容自己说话，制造凝视感或紧张感

push_in.label: 推镜头 (Dolly In)
push_in.motivation: 拉近心理距离，强调重要性或揭示细节
push_in.prompt_hint: slow dolly push-in, camera moves toward subject

pull_out.label: 拉镜头 (Dolly Out)
pull_out.motivation: 拉开心理距离，揭示环境或表达孤立
pull_out.prompt_hint: slow dolly out, camera reveals wider context

tracking.label: 跟拍 (Tracking Shot)
tracking.motivation: 与角色同步移动，增强代入感
tracking.prompt_hint: tracking shot alongside subject, parallax background

crane_up.label: 升降 (Crane/Jib)
crane_up.motivation: 上帝视角转换，揭示场景全貌
crane_up.prompt_hint: crane shot rising above scene, aerial reveal

handheld.label: 手持 (Handheld)
handheld.motivation: 纪实感/不安定感/主观视角

rack_focus.label: 变焦转移 (Rack Focus)
rack_focus.prompt_hint: rack focus from foreground to background

leading_lines.label: 引导线
leading_lines.hint: 利用线条引导视线至主体

frame_within_frame.label: 框中框
frame_within_frame.hint: 利用门窗/建筑结构创造层次感

symmetry.label: 对称构图
symmetry.hint: 居中对称，传达秩序/压迫/仪式感

negative_space.label: 留白
negative_space.hint: 大面积空旷空间，强调孤独/渺小

depth_layers.label: 前景-中景-背景
depth_layers.hint: 三层空间分离，增加纵深感

three_point_classic.key_light: 主光 — 45度侧前方，塑造主体形态和主要明暗
three_point_classic.fill_light: 补光 — 对侧柔光，控制阴影深度
three_point_classic.rim_light: 轮廓光 — 后方逆光，勾勒边缘分离背景

chiaroscuro.label: 明暗对照法
chiaroscuro.hint: 极端明暗对比，戏剧性阴影

natural_window.label: 自然窗光
natural_window.hint: 单一窗户光源，柔和渐变

practical_lights.label: 实景光源
practical_lights.hint: 仅用场景内现有灯具照明

low_key.label: 低调布光
low_key.hint: 大量阴影区域，局部光源

magic_hour.label: 魔幻时刻
magic_hour.hint: 日出日落黄金时段，暖调长影

neon_noir.label: 霓虹黑色
neon_noir.hint: 人造霓虹主光源，冷暖强对比

wong_kar_wai.camera_hints: slow motion handheld, anamorphic lens flares, neon reflections
wong_kar_wai.mood_keywords: longing, urban loneliness, fleeting moments, unspoken love

christopher_nolan.camera_hints: IMAX camera sweep, continuous take illusions, macro-to-wide reveals
christopher_nolan.mood_keywords: obsession, time manipulation, moral ambiguity, spectacle

denis_villeneuve.camera_hints: slow deliberate movements, wide establishing shots, silhouettes
denis_villeneuve.mood_keywords: existential dread, cosmic awe, silence as language

akira_kurosawa.camera_hints: axial cuts through movement, weather as emotional mirror, geometric blocking
akira_kurosawa.mood_keywords: honor, fate, nature's indifference, human resilience

sofia_coppola.camera_hints: static observation, natural window light, intimate medium close-ups
sofia_coppola.mood_keywords: ennui, feminine interiority, luxury emptiness, quiet melancholy

visual_metaphors: time as flowing water / sand through fingers / melting clock
memory as fading photograph / overgrown ruins / echo chamber
freedom as open door / breaking surface / unfurling wings
isolation as island / empty theater / snow globe
transformation as butterfly emergence / season change / sunrise after night
anti_cliche_directives: avoid golden hour cliché — find unexpected light quality
no slow-motion flower petals — use original imagery
reject generic 'epic' — ground emotion in specific detail
ban color-grading shortcuts — motivate every hue choice
forbid default camera moves — every move must earn its existence

emotional_color_palettes.nostalgia_faded: #E8DCC4 warm beige, #B8A99A dusty rose, #7A8B99 muted blue-gray
emotional_color_palettes.anxiety_electric: #FF006E hot pink, #8338EC deep purple, #3A86FF electric blue
emotional_color_palettes.hope_emerging: #CAF0F8 pale sky, #ADE8F4 soft cyan, #90E0EF clear water blue
emotional_color_palettes.grief_muted: #2B2D42 dark navy, #8D99AE slate gray, #EDF2F4 cold white
